Elbert Arryn was a member of House Arryn and nephew of Lord Jon Arryn. At the time of his death he was the heir to the Vale of Arryn.[3]

History[ ]

Elbert was born at roughly the same time his father Ser Ronnel Arryn was dying. After the death of his father, Elbert became Lord Jon Arryn's heir.[2]

When Brandon Stark learned that his sister Lyanna had been abducted by Prince Rhaegar Targaryen, Brandon raced off to King's Landing accompanied by a party that included Elbert. The party rode into the Red Keep and demanded Rhaegar's head. King Aerys II Targaryen had them all arrested and summoned their fathers to King's Landing to answer for their sons' crimes. Aerys had all the men killed except for Ethan Glover.[3]
